description:
The quiz assesses proficiency in fundamental data structures such as stacks, lists, and trees, as well as core algorithmic concepts and time‑complexity analysis. It is moderately challenging, suitable for learners who have completed introductory coursework and are preparing for technical interviews. The tone is instructional and supportive, guiding participants through 20 focused questions.
Topics: Stacks, Lists, Trees, Algorithm design, Time complexity, Big O notation
Audience: Students and early‑career developers who have completed an introductory course in data structures and algorithms and are preparing for coding interviews.
